span.p:
Initial state when payment
intent is created via API

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Funds reserved on card
Not yet transferred
Can be voided at no cost

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Funds will be transferred
in next settlement batch

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Funds transferred to
merchant account
Refund window opens

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Funds provisionally reversed
Merchant must respond
within 7-21 days

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Auth cancelled before capture
No funds moved
No fees charged
